steps.title: Identify corresponding angles
steps.content: Lines $r$ and $s$ are parallel, and line $n$ is a transversal. The angle marked $164^\circ$ and the angle marked $x^\circ$ are in corresponding positions.

steps.title: Use the parallel line rule
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines are congruent, so $x$ has the same measure as the marked corresponding angle. The answer is 164.
